T01_TOWN_01_message.message1: Should I help too?
It's okay, I'll finish this quick. Just wait right there.
Shouldn't you be talking to Plachta instead of me right now?
If you've got time to talk to me, you should be turning Plachta into a doll.
It seems we're quite lucky, being able to witness such an important moment in history.
Hehe, I'm excited about this... Very excited...
For Doll Making.
Moving my body is still a little awkward. Maybe because I was a book for so long...
Maybe we should go outside... Although... I could have sworn I needed to tell you something...
There's no time to play around. There's still a lot that I need to teach you.
Regardless of the contents, it's true that my memories returned. Just keep it up.
The accumulation of knowledge is my true purpose. Your growth is connected to my goal.
500 years... It's already been that long...
You're looking much more like an alchemist lately, Sophie... Although you still have much to learn.
I don't know if I can turn back into a human, but I do look forward to going places with you.
If my memories return, I'll likely remember more about the "Cauldron of Knowledge". Continue your alchemy studies.
Teaching brings a good feeling too... Watching your growth makes me feel that way.
Could you at least come up with a better name than "Operation Humanize Plachta"...
...I really will get mad if you act without thinking again.
Transfer my soul into a doll... Your ideas really do surprise me at times.
